intro.invoice: Select available prepayment and/or one or more unallocated user's memorandums to apply to the invoice.
intro.payment: Select one or more unallocated memorandums from the user's local account to apply to the payment before paying.

notification.error: At least one item must be selected.
notification.success: The memorandums were successfully allocated to {{type, lowercase}} #{{id}}.

applyMemos.secondaryIntro: Leave all of the checkboxes empty to skip this action and proceed to payment.

title.payment: Allocate memorandums to Notice of Payment #{{id}}

comment.label: Comment
comment.placeholder: Please include as many details as possible.

disputeTalentPayments.label: Include talent payments in this dispute.

invoice.intro: What is the invoice issue that you're disputing?

notification.success: The Invoice Dispute was successfully submitted.

invoice.title: Dispute Invoice #{{nodeId}}

payment.intro: What is the exact payment issue that you're disputing?

notification.success: The Payment Dispute was successfully submitted.

payment.title: Dispute Notice of Payment #{{nodeId}}

resolveTalentPaymentDisputes.label: Include talent payments in this dispute resolution

disputeResolveModal.intro: Are you sure you want to resolve this dispute?

notification.success: The {{type, startCase}} Dispute was successfully resolved.

disputeResolveModal.title: Resolve dispute for {{type, startCase}} #{{documentNumber}}

placeholder.invoice: A note with additional details for the client.
placeholder.payment: A note with additional details for the payee.

create.invoice: Note for Invoice #{{documentNumber}} was successfully created.
create.payment: Note for Notice of Payment #{{documentNumber}} was successfully created.

update.invoice: Note for Invoice #{{documentNumber}} has been updated.
update.payment: Note for Notice of Payment #{{documentNumber}} has been updated.

create.payment: Create note for Notice of Payment #{{documentNumber}}

update.payment: Update note for Notice of Payment #{{documentNumber}}

success.invoice: The due date of Invoice #{{documentNumber}} was successfully updated.
success.payment: The due date of Payment #{{documentNumber}} was successfully updated.
